description_long: This sculpture depicts a young, nude male figure standing on a rectangular plinth. The figure has curly hair and gazes downward, with one hand resting on his chest and the other holding a staff or stick that touches the ground. A draped cloth partially covers his lower body, adding a sense of modesty and classical style. The anatomical details are finely rendered, with visible musculature and naturalistic posture. The surface appears to be smooth and made of a light-colored stone, such as marble or a similar material. The overall impression is one of innocence and contemplation, reminiscent of classical or neoclassical statuary.
description: A finely detailed sculpture of a young, nude male figure with curly hair, holding a staff and partially draped in cloth, standing on a rectangular plinth. The surface is smooth and light-colored, evoking classical or neoclassical art.
description_view_0: Front view showing the boy's face, chest, and the staff held in his right hand, with the draped cloth clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm holding the staff, and the draped cloth's side contours.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the way the cloth falls behind the figure, as well as the staff's position.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the hand on the chest, and the staff's alignment with the leg.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the background is isolated and does not indicate a particular setting.
